borderline_notes.note: CRITICAL: This tests skill-iterator.md's ability to orchestrate a complex multi-file reading workflow. Without explicit guidance, a generic LLM would read files ad-hoc, not in the required order.
Test case 8 focuses on data-driven analysis. The heatmap concept requires understanding HALT as an aggregatable event type.
Even though generic LLM could produce structured output, the Skill Iterator format is very specific. Borderline PASS for generic in format, but FAIL in semantic understanding.

effectiveness_gain.interpretation: FTWNOW skill provides massive value in structured guidance for complex orchestration tasks

analysis_methodology.with_skill_evaluation: For each assertion, searched SKILL.md + Agent files + Rules + Checklists for explicit guidance. If guidance exists and addresses assertion, scored PASS.
analysis_methodology.without_skill_evaluation: Asked: Would a generic LLM (Claude without FTWNOW guidance) naturally produce this behavior? Generic knowledge (TDD, security practices, logging) scored PASS. FTWNOW-specific orchestration (Agent loading, structured gates, Phase regression) scored FAIL.
analysis_methodology.confidence_levels: Used explicit references to file locations (line numbers) whenever possible. Avoided inference where specification was ambiguous.
analysis_methodology.special_focus: Test cases 7-8 were analyzed with emphasis on: (1) File format specifications must be exact (JSONL vs JSON); (2) Field presence matters for machine readability; (3) Skill Iterator's three-step workflow must be strictly ordered.
